tests.name: Listener registry
tests.evidence: A button with addEventListener is classified as wired.

tests.name: Unwired control detection
tests.evidence: A visible button without handler, listener, navigation or native behavior is reported.

tests.name: Contrast detection
tests.evidence: Low-contrast control text creates a contrast finding with a calculated ratio.

tests.name: Covered-control detection
tests.evidence: elementFromPoint identifies a layer covering the center of a button.

tests.name: Accessible label detection
tests.evidence: An input without label or ARIA name is reported.

tests.name: Touch-target detection
tests.evidence: A 28 x 28 px button is reported as too small for comfortable touch use.

tests.name: Audit Pro mount
tests.evidence: The new interface mounts in #auditpro and renders five diagnostic tabs plus the summary.

tests.name: Recovery interface
tests.evidence: Cache/version, productive trash, diagnostic trash and restoration scope render correctly.

tests.name: Local preference undo
tests.evidence: A second local preference write is captured and restored to its previous value.

tests.name: Non-destructive restrictions
tests.evidence: New modules contain no setInterval, MutationObserver, eval, dynamic Function or Realtime channel creation.

tests.name: Version alignment
tests.evidence: HTML, runtime config, manifest, PWA cache and release marker identify v17.15.2.

tests.name: Protected modules
tests.evidence: No existing product JavaScript or CSS module was modified.

pending_after_vercel: Open each dynamic panel and rerun the audit so controls created on demand are included.
Validate cache reset using the deployed Service Worker.
Run Auditoría Pro with a productive authenticated role.
Compare the final health line against 96 health, 0 failures and the known Work 360 warning.
